# Add External Calendar Service Integrations

## Description
Integrate with popular calendar services like Google Calendar, Outlook, and Apple Calendar to sync events and provide unified scheduling capabilities.

## Type
- **Type:** New Feature
- **Priority:** High
- **Component:** AI Agent, Integration
- **Milestone:** AI Agent v2.0

## Use Case
Users can connect their Google Calendar and the AI agent can see all their events, suggest times that work with their existing schedule, and sync new events back to Google Calendar.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Google Calendar integration (read/write)
- [ ] Microsoft Outlook integration
- [ ] Apple Calendar integration
- [ ] Two-way sync for events
- [ ] Conflict detection across multiple calendars
- [ ] Unified view of all calendar events
- [ ] Secure OAuth authentication
- [ ] Handle calendar-specific features (recurring, reminders)

## Technical Requirements
- [ ] Implement OAuth flows for each service
- [ ] Create calendar sync service
- [ ] Add calendar-specific API integrations
- [ ] Implement conflict resolution across calendars
- [ ] Add calendar management UI
- [ ] Handle rate limiting and API quotas
- [ ] Implement secure credential storage

## Implementation Notes
- Use OAuth 2.0 for secure authentication
- Implement webhook support for real-time sync
- Handle different calendar formats (iCal, etc.)
- Consider calendar-specific limitations and features
- Add user controls for sync preferences
